intro.title: Who We Are
intro.description: Nanjing Flyhigh Software Technology Co., Ltd. is a leading software development company dedicated to delivering innovative digital solutions for businesses worldwide. With a team of experienced engineers and designers, we transform ideas into powerful software products.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To empower businesses with cutting-edge software solutions that drive growth and innovation in the digital age

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be a trusted global technology partner, recognized for excellence and innovation in software development

services.noCasesDesc: We're working on exciting projects. Check back soon!
services.ctaDesc: Let's discuss how we can help bring your vision to life

web.title: Web Application Development
web.description: Modern, scalable web applications built with the latest technologies

cases.name: E-commerce Platform
cases.description: Full-featured online shopping platform with payment integration
cases.fullDescription: A comprehensive omni-channel e-commerce solution for a renowned brand, supporting both B2C and B2B models. Integrated features include product management, order processing, membership system, marketing promotions, and data analytics. Supports WeChat Pay, Alipay, and multiple payment methods, processing 100K+ daily orders.

cases.name: Enterprise Dashboard
cases.description: Real-time business intelligence and analytics dashboard
cases.fullDescription: Custom business intelligence platform for a large manufacturing enterprise, integrating data from ERP, CRM, and supply chain systems. Provides real-time data visualization, custom reports, and predictive analytics, helping decision-makers quickly gain business insights and improve decision-making efficiency by 30%.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.description: Native and cross-platform mobile applications for iOS and Android

cases.name: Fitness Tracking App
cases.description: Cross-platform health and fitness tracking application
cases.fullDescription: A cross-platform fitness app combining workout tracking, diet logging, and health data analytics. Supports both iOS and Android, integrates with wearable device data sync. Has over 500K active users with 4.8-star app store rating.

cases.name: Social Media App
cases.fullDescription: Vertical social platform for young demographics, supporting photo/video posts, live streaming, interest groups, and real-time messaging. Built with real-time communication technology, supporting millions of concurrent users. Reached 1M users within 6 months of launch.

cases.name: Manufacturing ERP
cases.fullDescription: Custom full-featured ERP system for a medium-sized manufacturing enterprise, covering procurement, inventory, production, sales, finance, and HR modules. Achieves full digitalization of business processes, increasing production efficiency by 25% and reducing inventory costs by 30%.

cloud.title: Cloud & DevOps
cloud.description: Cloud infrastructure and modern DevOps practices

cases.name: Cloud Migration
cases.description: Successfully migrated legacy systems to cloud infrastructure
cases.fullDescription: Helped a financial enterprise migrate core business systems from traditional IDC to Alibaba Cloud. Included system architecture design, containerization, and CI/CD pipeline setup. Achieved 99.99% system availability and reduced operational costs by 40%.

iot.title: IoT & Hardware Integration
iot.description: End-to-end IoT solutions with deep hardware device integration

cases.name: Smart Factory
cases.description: Industrial IoT solution for manufacturing automation
cases.fullDescription: Intelligent factory solution for an automotive manufacturer, integrating 1000+ sensor devices for real-time equipment monitoring, fault prediction, and energy management. Through data analytics and AI algorithms, achieved 15% production efficiency improvement and 50% equipment failure rate reduction.

cases.name: Environmental Monitoring
cases.description: Real-time environmental sensors data collection system
cases.fullDescription: Urban environmental monitoring system for the Environmental Protection Bureau, deploying over 200 monitoring stations to collect real-time air quality, noise, and water quality data. Features data visualization dashboards, threshold alerts, and automated report generation.
